name: Cyrix
description_en: American x86-compatible CPU designer (defunct); produced the 6x86 and MII processors before being absorbed into National Semiconductor and VIA in the late 1990s.
description_ko: 미국의 x86 호환 CPU 디자이너(현재 청산). 1990년대 후반 National Semiconductor와 VIA에 흡수되기 전 6x86 및 MII 프로세서를 생산.
